author: missirol
body:
This PR adds a text file to compute jet-energy-scale corrections for L1-Scouting AK4 "CaloJets" (jets created by clustering CaloTowers using the anti-kt algorithm with R=0.4).

The method used to derive these corrections was suggested by Giovanni Petrucciani. More info can be found in the updated "readme" file, and in [this slide (and links therein)](https://indico.cern.ch/event/1574433/contributions/6951895/attachments/3243465/5786556/260323_L1ScoutingWS_Run3CaloTowers.pdf#page=13).

The corresponding CMSSW updates to make use of this file are in https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50785.

This PR does not technically depend on https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50785; it simply adds the file in question.

I plan to backport the corresponding `cmsdist` update down to 16_0_X like for https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50785 (see the description of the latter for more context).
title: Add JEC file for L1-Scouting AK4 "CaloJets" (`Run3Winter25` MC)
